Dublin, Ireland. 20/07/2014 - Tricolour shoulder patch of a soldier from the Irish Army at the Bray International Air Show. Six soldiers of various ranks were made available to answer questions regarding all aspects of army life including activities and deployments around the world, and also to gave recruitment advice to people interested in joining along with literature about upcoming recruitment activities for listed and commissioned officers. Ireland is an Independent country and not part of NATO so the Irish Army is deployed for peacekeeping, humanitarian aid, and security around important sites around Ireland such as airports, ports, government buildings and patrolling the Irish territorial waters. ireland stock pictures, royalty-free photos \u0026 images","id":"1752415029","assetId":"1752415029","agreement":null,"agreements":[],"agreementDetails":[],"assetType":"image","family":"creative","editorialOnly":true,"licenseType":null,"quality":"Common","clipLength":null,"cirActionCount":null,"filmDefinition":null,"seoDuration":null,"filmPreviewUrl":null,"istockCollection":"Main","editorialProducts":null,"eventName":null,"eventId":null,"eventDate":null,"eventUrlSlug":null,"thumbUrl":"https://media.istockphoto.com/id/1752415029/photo/shoulder-patch-of-a-soldier-from-the-irish-army-on-camouflaged-uniform.jpg?s=612x612\u0026w=0\u0026k=20\u0026c=7BTfhrwenlsdebct7_MMeylwoWp7jL14Zp0IvNID1YI=","releaseCode":"NR","mediaType":"Photography","dateSubmitted":"2023-11-09","slot":49,"isAnalogArchive":null,"isCallForImage":false,"isIstockSignature":false,"title":"Shoulder patch of a soldier from the Irish Army on camouflaged uniform.","shortTitle":"Shoulder patch of a soldier from the Irish Army on camouflaged...","caption":"Dublin, Ireland. 20/07/2014 - Tricolour shoulder patch of a soldier from the Irish Army at the Bray International Air Show. Six soldiers of various ranks were made available to answer questions regarding all aspects of army life including activities and deployments around the world, and also to gave recruitment advice to people interested in joining along with literature about upcoming recruitment activities for listed and commissioned officers. Ireland is an Independent country and not part of NATO so the Irish Army is deployed for peacekeeping, humanitarian aid, and security around important sites around Ireland such as airports, ports, government buildings and patrolling the Irish territorial waters.","orientation":"Horizontal","topKeywords":null,"usageInfo":"available for |editorial uses|. |learn
